2604.18490.title: LQM: Linguistically Motivated Multidimensional Quality Metrics for Machine Translation
2604.18490.paper_summary: Existing MT evaluation frameworks, including automatic metrics and human evaluation schemes such as Multidimensional Quality Metrics (MQM), are largely language-agnostic. However, they often fail to capture dialect- and culture-specific errors in diglossic languages (e.g., Arabic), where translation failures stem from mismatches in language variety, content coverage, and pragmatic appropriateness rather than surface form alone.We introduce LQM: Linguistically Motivated Multidimensional Quality Metrics for MT. LQM is a hierarchical error taxonomy for diagnosing MT errors through six linguistically grounded levels: sociolinguistics, pragmatics, semantics, morphosyntax, orthography, and graphetics (Figure 1). We construct a bidirectional parallel corpus of 3,850 sentences (550 per variety) spanning seven Arabic dialects (Egyptian, Emirati, Jordanian, Mauritanian, Moroccan, Palestinian, and Yemeni), derived from conversational, culturally rich content. We evaluate six LLMs in a zero-shot setting and conduct expert span-level human annotation using LQM, producing 6,113 labeled error spans across 3,495 unique erroneous sentences, along with severity-weighted quality scores. We complement this analysis with an automatic metric (spBLEU). Though validated here on Arabic, LQM is a language-agnostic framework designed to be easily applied to or adapted for other languages. LQM annotated errors data, prompts, and annotation guidelines are publicly available at https://github.com/UBC-NLP/LQM_MT.
2604.18490.paper_summary_zh: 現有的機器翻譯評估框架，包括自動指標和人類評估方案，如多維質量指標（MQM），在很大程度上是語言無關的。<lb/>然而，它們往往無法捕捉到在雙語言中（例如，阿拉伯語）方言和文化特定的錯誤，這些翻譯失敗源於語言變體、內容覆蓋和語用適當性之間的不匹配，而不僅僅是表面形式。<lb/>我們介紹LQM：語言驅動的多維質量指標，用於機器翻譯。<lb/>LQM是一個層次錯誤分類法，通過六個語言學基礎的層次來診斷機器翻譯錯誤：社會語言學、語用學、語義學、形態句法學、正字法和書寫學（圖1）。<lb/>我們構建了一個雙向平行語料庫，包含3,850個句子（每種方言550個），涵蓋七種阿拉伯方言（埃及方言、阿聯酋方言、約旦方言、毛里塔尼亞方言、摩洛哥方言、巴勒斯坦方言和也門方言），這些句子來自於對話和文化豐富的內容。<lb/>我們在零樣本環境中評估六個大型語言模型，並使用LQM進行專家範圍級別的人類標註，產生了6,113個標註的錯誤範圍，涵蓋3,495個獨特的錯誤句子，以及嚴重性加權的質量分數。<lb/>我們用自動指標（spBLEU）補充這一分析。<lb/>雖然在此對阿拉伯語進行了驗證，但LQM是一個語言無關的框架，旨在輕鬆應用或調整到其他語言。<lb/>LQM標註的錯誤數據、提示和標註指南可在https://github.com/UBC-NLP/LQM_MT上公開獲得。
2604.18490.author: Samar M. Magdy et.al.
2604.18490.authors: Samar M. Magdy, Fakhraddin Alwajih, Abdellah El Mekki, Wesam El-Sayed, Muhammad Abdul-Mageed
